achievements.description: Defeat Ice Wizard in Ice Pyramid 3 with Asha's initial equipments without using Healing Medicine or Herbs.

achievements.description: Defeat the Jelly Brothers in Sky Castle with Asha's initial equipments without using Healing Medicine or Herbs.

achievements.description: Defeat the Cloud Wizard in Sky Castle with Asha's initial equipments without using Healing Medicine or Herbs.

achievements.title: Code Of Conduct
achievements.description: In Underground Fort, defeat Harpy, Ostrich, Minotaur and Tikbalang without taking damage in their respective rooms. (No leaving
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Lucid Nightmare
achievements.description: Defeat Fear Incarnation with Asha's initial armor and shield (any sword except legendary) without using Medicine or Herbs.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Knowledge Is The Only Thing That Can Never Be Taken From You
achievements.description: Read all the books somewhere in Rapagna without leaving the room. (Anytime after saving the first spirit)

achievements.title: What Has Changed, Your Highness?
achievements.description: See for yourself the Queen's remarkable personality change (before completing Ice Pyramid 3)
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.description: Answer correctly the Sphinx quiz in the Ice Desert.

achievements.description: Complete the Ice Desert and all the 3 Ice Pyramids in one sitting without leaving or opening the map found there (No deaths)

achievements.title: Dreams Ridden With Pain
achievements.description: Travel from the entrance of Ice Pyramid 1 to the statues room and open the boss's door without killing any enemies.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: The Hardest Part Of Letting Go
achievements.description: In Underground Fort, kill the last blue wizard in the Wizards Room without damaging others or taking damage.

achievements.title: Life Itself Is Only A Vision ... A Dream ...
achievements.description: Find and view the Monster World map.

achievements.description: Help the poor man in Stream Sanctuary.

achievements.description: Enter Ice Pyramid 2, find all the statues and open the passage using them without using Pepelogoo to find secret doors.

achievements.description: Find the Elder who saves your progress hidden in Ice Pyramid 3.

achievements.title: Value Of Life
achievements.description: Make a purchase on the little heart machine.

achievements.title: My Lucky Day!
achievements.description: 777 that's the number of success!
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Advertising Is Everything!
achievements.description: Trade with the rich lady of Rapagna and sell your product a little more expensive!

achievements.description: Complete Tower of Silence and arrive in Rapagna City with no money or having collected any life drops
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.description: Find Magic Merchant.

achievements.title: Cut! Slash! Thrust! Slice!
achievements.description: Buy all available swords during the game.

achievements.description: Buy all shields available during the game.

achievements.description: Buy all armors available during the game.

achievements.description: Accumulate 10 Life Drops and obtain your first blue heart.

achievements.title: ~ Tears On Your Cheek ~
achievements.description: Find and collect all 150 Life Drops.

achievements.title: Even Death Flow
achievements.description: Kill 100 enemies with the same sword.

achievements.title: ~ Refreshing My Soul ~
achievements.description: Wash your face in cold water somewhere frozen after missing an answer.
